/usr/bin/clang++ --target=aarch64-none-elf -ffreestanding -nostdlib -mcpu=cortex-a72 -Wall -Wextra -Werror -fno-stack-protector -mstrict-align -fno-pie -Wno-unused-command-line-argument -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -fno-threadsafe-statics -fno-use-cxa-atexit -O3 -DNDEBUG -nostdlib -static --ld-path=/opt/homebrew/bin/aarch64-elf-ld -nostdlib -static -T /Users/stephen/git/viperdos/user/user.ld CMakeFiles/shell.prg.dir/shell/main.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/shell.prg.dir/shell/shell_io_pty.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/shell.prg.dir/shell/text_buffer_stub.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/shell.prg.dir/servers/consoled/embedded_shell.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/shell.prg.dir/servers/consoled/shell_cmds.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/shell.prg.dir/servers/consoled/keymap.cpp.obj -o ../shell.prg  ../lib/libviperlibc.a
